description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem buses. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr, rarray = afswhntbusreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem buses to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or switched shunt quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service switched shunt buses (type code 1, 2 or 3) with at least one in- service switched shunt.
for only in-service switched shunt buses (type code 1, 2 or 3), including those with only out-of-service switched shunts.
for all in-service buses, including those that are not switched shunt buses.
for all switched shunt buses, including those with only out-of-service switched shunts.
for all buses, including those that are not switched shunt buses.

string.description: Actual bus voltage magnitude, in pu.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Bus voltage phase angle, in radians.
Bus voltage phase angle, in degrees.
Zero sequence total nominal in-service switched bus shunt, in pu.
Total actual in-service switched bus shunt, in MVAR.
Total nominal in-service switched bus shunt at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVAR.
Zero sequence total nominal in-service switched bus shunt, in MVAR.
Bus mismatch (0.0 if bus type code > 3), in MVA.
Total actual in-service switched bus shunt (units determined by power output option setting).
Total nominal in-service switched bus shunt at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output option setting).
Zero sequence total nominal in-service switched bus shunt (units determined by power output option setting).
Bus mismatch (0.0 if bus type code > 3) (units determined by power output option setting).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case; when STRING = ‘PU_BSWZERO’, BSWBZERO’ and ‘O_BSWZERO’.
